definition: The complete framework combining ALL concepts into a buy/sell model. This is NOT a separate concept — it IS the dependency graph applied as a workflow.

buy_model.step_2: premium_discount: Price in discount zone of dealing_range
buy_model.step_4: liquidity_sweep: Manipulation sweeps SSL (takes out lows)
buy_model.step_5: displacement: Creates FVG + OB confirming reversal
buy_model.step_6: optimal_trade_entry: Enter retracement into FVG/OB at OTE (0.618-0.705)

sell_model.step_2: premium_discount: Price in premium zone of dealing_range
sell_model.step_4: liquidity_sweep: Manipulation sweeps BSL (takes out highs)
sell_model.step_5: displacement: Creates FVG + OB confirming reversal
sell_model.step_6: optimal_trade_entry: Enter retracement into FVG/OB at OTE (0.618-0.705)
